parameters.query:
INSERT INTO users (name, email, password, is_active, is_verified, role)
VALUES (
  '{{ ($json.body.name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.body.email || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.body.password }}',
  TRUE,
  FALSE,
  'user'
);

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS s_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_processed
FROM job_items
WHERE job_id = '{{ $json.job_id }}';

UPDATE jobs
SET
    status        = 'failed',
    success_count = {{ $json.s_count || 0 }},
    failed_count  = {{ $json.f_count || 0 }},
    error_message = 'Job failed due to database connection timeout. Processed {{ $json.total_processed || 0 }} records before failure.',
    completed_at  = NOW(),
    updated_at    = NOW()
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Edit:Format Execution_id").first().json.job_id }}';

INSERT INTO error_logs (
    job_id,
    user_email,
    user_name,
    user_id,
    status,
    action,
    error_message,
    customer_name,
    file_name,
    created_at
) 
VALUES (
    '{{ $("SQL:Execute Job_status").first().json.job_id }}',
    '{{ $("Webhook:Create Invoice").first().json.headers["x-user-email"] }}',
    '{{ $("Webhook:Create Invoice").first().json.headers["x-user-name"] }}',
    '{{ $("Webhook:Create Invoice").first().json.headers["x-user-id"] }}',
    'failed',
    'SQL Timout',
    '{{ ($json.error?.message || "QB Customer details insertion error").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ ($json.metadata?.quickbooks_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $("Edit:Format Execution_id").first().json.body.file_name }}',
    NOW()
);

INSERT INTO jobs (
    job_id,
    user_id,
    file_name,
    file_size_kb,
    status,
    execution_id,
    created_at,
    updated_at
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.job_id }}',
    '{{ $("Webhook:Create Invoice").first().json.headers["x-user-id"] }}',
    '{{ $("Webhook:Create Invoice").first().json.body.file_name }}',
    '{{ $("Webhook:Create Invoice").first().json.body.file_size_kb }}',
    'processing',
    '{{ $json["execution_id "] }}',
    NOW(),
    NOW()
);
SELECT 
    LAST_INSERT_ID() AS id,
    '{{ $json.job_id }}' AS job_id;
SELECT name,qb_item_id from quickbooks_items

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as s_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as f_count
FROM job_items 
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Edit:Format Execution_id").first().json.job_id }}';

UPDATE jobs 
SET 
    success_count = {{ $json.s_count }},
    
    failed_count = {{ $json.f_count }},
    
    status = CASE
        WHEN {{ $json.f_count }} = 0 
        THEN 'all successful'
        
        ELSE 'partially done'
    END,
    
    completed_at = NOW(),
    
    updated_at = NOW()

WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Edit:Format Execution_id").first().json.job_id }}';

SELECT 
    ji.*,
    j.success_count,
    j.failed_count
FROM job_items ji
JOIN jobs j 
    ON ji.job_id = j.job_id
WHERE ji.job_id = '{{ $("Edit:Format Execution_id").first().json.job_id }}'
AND COALESCE(ji.customer_name, '') != '';

SELECT 
    ji.*,
    j.success_count,
    j.failed_count
FROM job_items ji
JOIN jobs j 
    ON ji.job_id = j.job_id
WHERE ji.job_id = '{{ $("Edit:Format Execution_id").first().json.job_id }}'
AND COALESCE(ji.customer_name, '') != '';

SELECT 
  u.is_active,
  r.name AS current_role,
  GROUP_CONCAT(p.name) AS current_privileges
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN role_privileges rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
LEFT JOIN privileges p ON rp.privilege_id = p.id
WHERE u.id = '{{ $json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
GROUP BY u.id
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE jobs
SET 
    status = 'failed',
    error_message = 'File parse error: {{ ($json.error?.message || "unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    completed_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Edit:Format Execution_id").first().json.job_id }}';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS s_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_processed
FROM job_items
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Edit:Format Execution_id").first().json.job_id }}';

UPDATE jobs
SET
    status        = 'failed',
    success_count = {{ $json.s_count || 0 }},
    failed_count  = {{ $json.f_count || 0 }},
    error_message = 'Authorization Issue. Processed {{ $json.total_processed || 0 }} records before failure.',
    completed_at  = NOW(),
    updated_at    = NOW()
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Edit:Format Execution_id").first().json.job_id }}';

SELECT
  u.id, u.name, u.email, u.password, u.is_active,
  r.name AS role,
  GROUP_CONCAT(p.name) AS privileges
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN role_privileges rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
LEFT JOIN privileges p ON rp.privilege_id = p.id
WHERE u.email = '{{ ($json.body.email || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
GROUP BY u.id
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO user_management_error_logs (
  user_id,
  user_email,
  action,
  status,
  error_message,
  details,
  metadata
)
VALUES (
  NULL,
  '{{ ($("Edit:Get Request boby").item.json.body.email || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'sign_in',
  'failed',
  '{{ ($json._log.error_message || "Failed to sign in").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'Failed to fetch user details',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ attempted_email: $("Edit:Get Request boby").item.json.body.email || "" }) }}'
);

INSERT INTO user_management_error_logs (
  user_id,
  user_email,
  action,
  status,
  error_message,
  details,
  metadata
)
VALUES (
  '{{ ($("Code:Validate User Details").item.json.user.id || "") }}',
  '{{ ($("Code:Validate User Details").item.json.user.email || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'sign_in',
  'error',
  'Token generation failed',
  '{{ ($json.error?.message || "JWT node failed").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $("Code:Validate User Details").item.json.user.id || "" }) }}'
);

SELECT 
  u.is_active,
  r.name AS current_role,
  GROUP_CONCAT(p.name) AS current_privileges
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN role_privileges rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
LEFT JOIN privileges p ON rp.privilege_id = p.id
WHERE u.id = '{{ $json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
GROUP BY u.id
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    j.*,
    u.name AS user_name
FROM jobs j
LEFT JOIN users u 
    ON j.user_id = u.id
WHERE (
    (
        SELECT r.name 
        FROM users u2
        LEFT JOIN roles r 
            ON u2.role_id = r.id 
        WHERE u2.id = '{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
        LIMIT 1
    ) IN ('admin', 'reviewer')
    OR j.user_id = '{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
)
AND (
    NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.startDate || "" }}', '') IS NULL
    OR DATE(j.created_at) >= NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.startDate || "" }}', '')
)
AND (
    NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.endDate || "" }}', '') IS NULL
    OR DATE(j.created_at) <= NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.endDate || "" }}', '')
)
AND (
    NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.status || "" }}', '') IS NULL
    OR (
        '{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.status }}' = 'success'
        AND j.success_count > 0
    )
    OR (
        '{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.status }}' = 'failed'
        AND j.failed_count > 0
    )
)
ORDER BY j.created_at DESC
LIMIT {{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.limit || 10 }}
OFFSET {{ (($("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.page || 1) - 1) * ($("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.limit || 10) }};

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM jobs
WHERE (
  (
    SELECT r.name 
    FROM users u 
    LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id 
    WHERE u.id = '{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
    LIMIT 1
  ) IN ('admin', 'reviewer')
  OR user_id = '{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
)
AND (
  NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.startDate || "" }}', '') IS NULL
  OR DATE(created_at) >= NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.startDate || "" }}', '')
)
AND (
  NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.endDate || "" }}', '') IS NULL
  OR DATE(created_at) <= NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.endDate || "" }}', '')
)
AND (
  NULLIF('{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.status || "" }}', '') IS NULL
  OR (
    '{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.status }}' = 'success'
    AND success_count > 0
  )
  OR (
    '{{ $("Webhook:Invoice_details").first().json.query.status }}' = 'failed'
    AND failed_count > 0
  )
);

SELECT 
  u.is_active,
  r.name AS current_role,
  GROUP_CONCAT(p.name) AS current_privileges
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN role_privileges rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
LEFT JOIN privileges p ON rp.privilege_id = p.id
WHERE u.id = '{{ $json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
GROUP BY u.id
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM job_items
WHERE job_id = '{{ $("Webhook: Invoice-Item-Details").first().json.query.jobId }}'
AND (
  '{{ $("Webhook: Invoice-Item-Details").first().json.query.status || "" }}' = ''
  OR status = '{{ $("Webhook: Invoice-Item-Details").first().json.query.status || "" }}'
);

UPDATE jobs j
SET 
    j.status = 'stopped by user',
    j.error_message = 'Job manually cancelled by user',
    j.success_count = (
        SELECT COUNT(*) 
        FROM job_items ji 
        WHERE ji.job_id = j.job_id 
        AND ji.status = 'success'
    ),
    j.failed_count = (
        SELECT COUNT(*) 
        FROM job_items ji 
        WHERE ji.job_id = j.job_id 
        AND ji.status IN ('failed', 'send_failed')
    ),
    j.completed_at = NOW(),
    j.updated_at = NOW()
WHERE j.execution_id = '{{ $("SQL: Fetch-Job-And-Execution-Ids").first().json.execution_id }}';

SELECT execution_id, job_id
FROM jobs
WHERE user_id = '{{ $json["used-id"] }}'
AND status = 'processing'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  u.is_active,
  r.name AS current_role,
  GROUP_CONCAT(p.name) AS current_privileges
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN role_privileges rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
LEFT JOIN privileges p ON rp.privilege_id = p.id
WHERE u.id = '{{ $json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
GROUP BY u.id
LIMIT 1;
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = '{{ $("Webhook: Reset-Password").first().json.used_id }}';

UPDATE users
SET 
    password   = '{{ $('Edit: Get-Password-Fields').item.json.new_password }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Edit: Get-Password-Fields').item.json.used_id }}'
AND is_active = 1;

SELECT job_id, user_id
FROM jobs
WHERE user_id = '{{ $('Edit: Get-Current-User').item.json.user_id }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    j.job_id,
    j.file_name,
    j.status,
    j.total_rows,
    j.error_message,
    j.created_at,
    j.completed_at,
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM job_items ji
        WHERE ji.job_id = j.job_id
    ) AS processed_rows,
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM job_items ji
        WHERE ji.job_id = j.job_id
        AND ji.status = 'success'
    ) AS success_count,
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM job_items ji
        WHERE ji.job_id = j.job_id
        AND ji.status IN ('failed')
    ) AS failed_count
FROM jobs j
WHERE j.job_id = '{{ $json.job_id }}'
AND j.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO error_logs (
    job_id,
    user_id,
    user_email,
    user_name,
    action,
    details,
    file_name,
    customer_name,
    status,
    error_message,
    ip_address,
    user_agent,
    metadata,
    created_at
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.job_id || "UNKNOWN" }}',
    '{{ $("Edit: Get-Current-User").first().json.user_id }}',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'job_status_fetch',
    'Job status polling failed',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'failed',
    '{{ $json.message }}',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    '{{ JSON.stringify({ endpoint: "job-status", job_id: $json.job_id }) }}',
    NOW()
);
SELECT status from jobs WHERE job_id = '{{ $json.job_id }}'

SELECT job_id
FROM jobs
WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  u.is_active,
  r.name AS current_role,
  GROUP_CONCAT(p.name) AS current_privileges
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN role_privileges rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
LEFT JOIN privileges p ON rp.privilege_id = p.id
WHERE u.id = '{{ $json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
GROUP BY u.id
LIMIT 1;

FROM users

SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT
        u.id,
        u.name,
        u.email,
        u.is_active,
        u.is_verified,
        u.created_at,
        r.name AS role,
        GROUP_CONCAT(p.name) AS privileges,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u2.id) FROM users u2) AS total_count
    FROM users u
    LEFT JOIN roles r
        ON u.role_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN role_privileges rp
        ON r.id = rp.role_id
    LEFT JOIN privileges p
        ON rp.privilege_id = p.id
    GROUP BY
        u.id, u.name, u.email, u.is_active,
        u.is_verified, u.created_at, r.name
) AS subquery
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT {{ parseInt($("Webhook: Users-List").first().json.query.limit) || 10 }}
OFFSET {{ ((parseInt($("Webhook: Users-List").first().json.query.page) || 1) - 1) * (parseInt($("Webhook: Users-List").first().json.query.limit) || 10) }};

SELECT 
  u.is_active,
  r.name AS current_role,
  GROUP_CONCAT(p.name) AS current_privileges
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN role_privileges rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
LEFT JOIN privileges p ON rp.privilege_id = p.id
WHERE u.id = '{{ $json.headers["x-user-id"] }}'
GROUP BY u.id
LIMIT 1;
